prompts.name: Balanced Exposure
prompts.text: Balance the exposure so the subject is clearly visible, highlights are controlled, and shadows retain detail.

prompts.name: Color Harmony
prompts.text: Improve color harmony across the subject, background, clothing, and lighting for a cohesive image.

prompts.name: Subject Focus
prompts.text: Keep strong focus on the main subject by controlling background complexity and visual contrast.

prompts.name: Depth Enhancement
prompts.text: Enhance depth with subtle foreground, midground, and background separation.

prompts.name: Soft Polish
prompts.text: Add a soft polished finish that improves appeal without blurring important details.

prompts.name: Crisp Details
prompts.text: Sharpen important details such as eyes, hair, clothing edges, and key props while avoiding overprocessing.

prompts.name: Natural Skin
prompts.text: Keep skin tones natural, flattering, and consistent with the lighting environment.

prompts.name: Clean Background
prompts.text: Clean up the background so it supports the subject and avoids distracting visual noise.

prompts.name: Material Consistency
prompts.text: Ensure each material looks consistent, with believable texture, thickness, and response to light.

prompts.name: Expression Readability
prompts.text: Make the facial expression clear, appealing, and emotionally readable.

prompts.name: Pose Readability
prompts.text: Make the body pose readable, anatomically coherent, and visually balanced.

prompts.name: Lighting Coherence
prompts.text: Ensure all lighting directions, shadows, highlights, and reflections feel coherent.

prompts.name: Style Consistency
prompts.text: Keep the style consistent across face, hair, clothes, props, background, and rendering.

prompts.name: Remove Visual Noise
prompts.text: Reduce unnecessary visual noise, repeated details, and clutter that weakens the final composition.

prompts.name: Export Polish
prompts.text: Apply a final polished look with strong clarity, clean detail, balanced colors, and finished presentation.
